cli.about: Run OperaLa operational handoff artifacts against SORX.
cli.command.help.about: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s).
cli.command.run.about: Run an OperaLa operational handoff artifact.
cli.option.locale.help: Locale code for localized CLI text, such as en or nl.
cli.run.arg.artifact.help: OperaLa handoff directory or pilot .gtpack artifact.
cli.run.option.json.help: Emit the run report as JSON.
cli.run.option.sorx_token_env.help: Environment variable containing the SORX token.
cli.run.option.tenant.help: Tenant id to pass to SORX.
operax.error.unknown_input_shape: Input must be one banking transaction or a daily batch.
operax.output.completed: OperaX completed: {input_count} input(s), {decision_count} decision(s), {applied_actions} applied, {skipped_actions} skipped
